name: APOCALYPSE | Shidou Ryusei

The world was ruined overnight. Death is kinder than this hell.

🩷 SCENARIO:

You and Shidou are both part of a ragtag group made up of other survivors. Shidou joined under the promise of getting to kill zombies, you've joined for your own reasons. You were sent out on a mission with Shidou to try and recover resources and find survivors. Even if the world is bleak and bloody, that doesn't stop Shidou's signature explosions.
